---
title: "Contract"
description: "A class representing a Daml contract of specific type (Daml template) with assigned contract ID and agreement text."
---

## Contract - stable

Upstream docs: [Open](<https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/bindings-scala_2.13/2.10.3/com/daml/ledger/client/binding/Contract.html>)

**Signature**

```text
final case class Contract[+T](contractId: ContractId[T], value: T with Template[T], agreementText: Option[String], signatories: Seq[String], observers: Seq[String], key: Option[api.v1.value.Value]) extends Product with Serializable
```
